title: After the Tenno Sho (Spring): The Bitter Taste ☆ of Victory

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer wins the spring Tenno Sho. Still,
she regrets not being able to act like herself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen runs earnestly on behalf of the
Mejiro family. On the other hand, Mejiro Palmer
runs for her own freedom...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She begins to wonder if that is really something
to be proud of. Or is she just being selfish?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her next goal is the spring Grand Prix, the
Takarazuka Kinen. Will Mejiro Palmer be able to
be her true self at a festival race the fans go crazy
for?
